column1: # Sweep 39A — Spark: s37 config + EMBED_BITS=7 (exploit int7 headroom)
# PURPOSE: s37_s42 got 1.35054 BPB with EMBED_BITS=8 (oversize +56KB).
#   Hypothesis: ultra-low MLR (0.006) produces smoothest weights → minimal int7 quant penalty.
#   build_alt (mlr=0.012, int7) achieved 1.36952 compliant. If int7 penalty scales with MLR,
#   mlr=0.006 may achieve ~1.36 or better — a new compliant record.
# ~95 min training + ~20 min eval each. Queue s42 first, s1337 after.
